svg.title: EM / Baum-Welch Algorithm
svg.desc: A loop diagram showing the EM / Baum-Welch algorithm: Initialize params → E-step (expected counts via forward-backward) → M-step (re-estimate params) → back to E-step. Side note: likelihood increases monotonically and converges to a local optimum.

text.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: algorithm converges to a local optimum (sensitive to initialisation)
